mapper.select: select id from recycle_bin where recycle_time <= now()
select file_id as id, user_id, recycle_time as createTime, file_size, file_name, path, is_folder, parent_id, original_file_name from recycle_bin where is_folder=0 and user_id=#{userId}
select file_id as id, user_id, recycle_time as createTime, file_size, file_name, path, is_folder, parent_id, original_file_name from recycle_bin where id=#{id} and is_folder=0
